name: lifecycle-tester
description: Contains benign pre and postinstall scripts to enable safe testing of lifecycle script settings in Node, Bun and Deno

scripts.preinstall: echo "Hello from preinstall, I shouldn't be enabled" && exit 1
scripts.postinstall: echo "Hello from postinstall, I shouldn't be enabled" && exit 1

author: J-K. Solbakken
